statement: Find two numbers in the array that multiply to give the target value.
note: LLM may map to two_sum (same structure), contradiction gate must catch multiply

statement: Given coins and a target, determine if it's possible to form the exact amount.
note: LLM may map to coin_change, but this is feasibility not optimization

statement: Find the longest subsequence where each element is at least as large as the previous.
note: LLM may map to LIS, non-strict is OUT

statement: Given a string, find the longest substring where each character appears at most twice.
note: LLM may map to longest_substring, modified constraint

statement: Convert string A to string B using only character swaps.
note: LLM may map to min_distance, operation restriction must catch swaps only
